diagrams.title: for Loop Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows initialization, condition check, execution, and increment flow in a for loop
diagrams.purpose: Visualize for loop execution flow and understand iteration sequence

diagrams.title: while vs do-while Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side flowcharts comparing condition checking order in while and do-while loops
elements: Decision diamond always comes first in while
Decision diamond after first process in do-while
diagrams.purpose: Understand the key difference that do-while always executes at least once

diagrams.title: Nested Loop for Delay
diagrams.description: Visual representation of nested for loops creating time delay in 8051
elements: Outer loop: i from 0 to count-1
diagrams.purpose: Understand how nested loops create programmable time delays in embedded systems

diagrams.title: 8051 LED Blink Timing Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows timing relationship between LED ON/OFF states using software delays
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how loops create timing intervals for LED control in 8051
